/CAL: PART 5 OF BIFURCATED PRELIMINARY HEARING/MO PC 17B/MO DENIED/HTA1:2, 3/871D: 1, 4/X: THE COURT FINDS THE ALLEGATION PURSUANT TO PC 186,22(B)(1) TO BE TRUE AS TO COUNT TWO,/X: THE DEFENDANT REMAINS OUT OF CUSTODY ON SURETY BOND,/CTORD: EXHIBITS WILL BE RETURNED TO THE PROFFERING PARTIES/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/WIT SWORN: JOSEPH EVERSON, SFPD   /WIT SWORN: LEONARD BROBERG, SFPD/EXHMA: PEOPLE'S 8, 9, 10 ,11, 12, 13, 14, 15, 16, ALLEXHIBITS ARE DOCUMENTS REFERRING TO PRIOR CONVICTIONS OF VARIOUS PEOPLE INCLUDING DEFENDANTS BENDER AND LOWE  /EXHMA: PEOPLE'S 17 THROUGH 31, COLOR PHOTOS OF VARIOUS INDIVIDUALS DOWNLOADED FROM THE PHONE OF JACORI BENDER/CONTD: CONCLUSION OF THE PRELIMINARY HEARING/

/CAL:BIFURCATED PRELIMINARY HEARING, PART 2/X: THE TESTIMONY OF WITNESS EDMUNDS CONCLUDES,/WIT SWORN: MATTHEW SULLIVAN, SFPD/EXHM: DEFENSE B AND C,PHOTOS OF DEFENDANTS, DEFENSE D, PHOTO OF CARS AT THE SCENE, DEFENSE E, PROPERTY RECEIPT FORMS, PEOPLE'S 2 AND 3, PHOTOS OF SUSPECTS, PEOPLE'S 4, HAND DRAWN DIAGRAM OF SCENE AT 60 LEAVENWORTH, PEOPLE'S5, COLOR PHOTO OF CAMERA IN TRUNK, PEOPLE'S 6, TWO PHOTOS ON ONE SHEET SHOWING CARS AT 60 LEAVENWORTH, PEOPLE'S 7, PICTURE OF JACKET AND HAT, DEFENSE F,SAME AS PEOPLE'S 4 MARKED BY THE WITNESS/WIT SWORN: STANISLAUS BRATCHIKOV, SFPD/CONTD: PART THREE OF BIFURCATED PRELIMINARY HEARING/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X: BEFORE THE HEARING, ALL DEFENDANTS PUT THEIR CONSENT TO BIFURCATION ON THE RECORD,/WIT SWORN: DANIEL EDMUND/EXHM: PEOPLE'S 1, 2 PAGE COLD SHOW ADMONITION, DEFENSE A, HAND-DRAWN DIAGRAM   /CONTD: PART TWO OF BIFURCATED PRELIMINARY HEARING/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/X:PUBLIC DEFENDER DECLARES CONFLICT,/CON:DAVID WISE/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LDPX:11-07-14/BAIL:250,000/CONTD:PREHEARING CONFERENCE ON 10-31-14/CONTD:PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 11-04-14/TE 3 DAYS/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/TEXT:TRANS TO DEPT 14/TRANS 14:FORTHWITH FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/
